detectors.description:
Reentrancy in WorldEliteInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (WorldEliteInu.sol#653-777):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (WorldEliteInu.sol#717)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (WorldEliteInu.sol#791-803)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (WorldEliteInu.sol#723)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (WorldEliteInu.sol#811)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (WorldEliteInu.sol#775)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (WorldEliteInu.sol#937)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (WorldEliteInu.sol#917)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (WorldEliteInu.sol#919)
	WorldEliteInu._rOwned (WorldEliteInu.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- WorldEliteInu._takeTeam(uint256) (WorldEliteInu.sol#931-939)
	- WorldEliteInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (WorldEliteInu.sol#891-927)
	- WorldEliteInu.balanceOf(address) (WorldEliteInu.sol#479-483)
	- WorldEliteInu.constructor() (WorldEliteInu.sol#413-443)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (WorldEliteInu.sol#775)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (WorldEliteInu.sol#945)
	WorldEliteInu._rTotal (WorldEliteInu.sol#341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- WorldEliteInu._getCurrentSupply() (WorldEliteInu.sol#1087-1097)
	- WorldEliteInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (WorldEliteInu.sol#943-949)
	- WorldEliteInu.constructor() (WorldEliteInu.sol#413-443)
	- WorldEliteInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (WorldEliteInu.sol#575-597)

Reentrancy in [WorldEliteInu._transfer(address,address,uint256)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L653-L777):

		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L919)
	[WorldEliteInu._rOwned](WorldEliteInu.sol#L329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [WorldEliteInu._takeTeam(uint256)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L931-L939)
	- [WorldEliteInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L891-L927)
	- [WorldEliteInu.balanceOf(address)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L479-L483)
	- [WorldEliteInu.constructor()](WorldEliteInu.sol#L413-L443)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L775)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L945)
	[WorldEliteInu._rTotal](WorldEliteInu.sol#L341) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [WorldEliteInu._getCurrentSupply()](WorldEliteInu.sol#L1087-L1097)
	- [WorldEliteInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L943-L949)

	- [WorldEliteInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](WorldEliteInu.sol#L575-L597)
